name: hk-safelink-ai
description: Premium URL security scanner with Next.js and FastAPI

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && pip install -r frontend/api/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "python -m uvicorn index:app --app-dir frontend/api --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
